Source: CDC PLACES County-Level Data. Values are age-adjusted or crude prevalence estimates.

Related Entities

  • hospital NEWPORT HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • snf AdviniaCare Newport, LLC 3-star, 114 beds
  • snf Grand Islander Center 2-star, 146 beds
  • snf Royal Middletown Nursing Center 3-star, 50 beds
  • snf Village House Nursing & Rehabilitation Center 5-star, 95 beds
  • snf John Clarke Senior Living 5-star, 60 beds
  • snf St Clare Home 3-star, 50 beds
  • condition Visits to doctor for routine checkup within the past year among adults Prevalence: 85.4%
  • condition Colorectal cancer screening among adults aged 45–75 years Prevalence: 76.7%
  • condition Visited dentist or dental clinic in the past year among adults Prevalence: 77.0%
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
